description: 各单位/装备的战损统计

queries.label: 单位战损统计
queries.sql: SELECT unit_name, SUM(loss_count) as total_loss FROM combat_loss GROUP BY unit_name ORDER BY total_loss DESC

queries.label: 装备类型战损分布
queries.sql: SELECT equipment_type, COUNT(*) as loss_count, SUM(damage_level) as total_damage FROM combat_loss GROUP BY equipment_type

queries.label: 战损明细
queries.sql: SELECT unit_name, equipment_type, loss_count, loss_reason, report_time FROM combat_loss ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT 50

queries.label: 各单位战果对比
queries.sql: SELECT unit_name, SUM(hit_count) as total_hits, SUM(destroy_count) as total_destroys FROM combat_result GROUP BY unit_name ORDER BY total_hits DESC

queries.label: 打击类型分布
queries.sql: SELECT attack_type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(effect_score) as total_score FROM combat_result GROUP BY attack_type

description: 弹药/燃料/物资消耗统计

queries.label: 资源消耗趋势
queries.sql: SELECT DATE(consume_time) as date, resource_type, SUM(amount) as total_amount FROM resource_consume GROUP BY DATE(consume_time), resource_type ORDER BY date

queries.label: 各类资源消耗总量
queries.sql: SELECT resource_type, SUM(amount) as total_amount, unit FROM resource_consume GROUP BY resource_type, unit
